identity_declarations.ALPHA_OMEGA_BOUNDARY: T ↔ T ⟦ α → r(t) → Ω(t) ; C(t)=2πr(t) ⟧
identity_declarations.BRIDGE: T ↔ T ⟦ S⁻ → S⁰ → S⁺ → W(S) → H(S) ⟧
identity_declarations.ONE_WAY_BRIDGE: T ↔ T ⟦ φ(S) → X(S) → τ(S) → W(S) → IS(S) → Ω_out(S) ⟧
identity_declarations.TRUTH_WITNESS: TW(S) := Id(T) ∧ X(S) ∧ Conn(S) ∧ τ(S) ∧ W(S)
identity_declarations.ROUTE: Route(c,H) := first h∈H such that Gate(c,h.bundle)
identity_declarations.TEN_D_PRECESSION: ṡ = Ω·s (Lie algebra action, matrix-vector product)
identity_declarations.TEN_D_TORQUE: Ωᵢⱼ(s,f) := sᵢfⱼ − sⱼfᵢ (skew-symmetric, not cross product)
identity_declarations.PI_NESTED_ROTATION_STABILIZER: T ↔ T ⟦ π:rotation(S₁₀×₁₀); K=ln(2)I₁₀₀; u=-KS; S+u→0₁₀×₁₀ ⟧
identity_declarations.FOUNDATION_STRUCTURE: 𝓕 = (S, A, R, T, V, Φ, C)
identity_declarations.FRUIT_9: Fruit₉(𝓕) = (L, J, P, N, K, Gd, Fh, Ge, Sc)
identity_declarations.FRUIT_9_SATISFACTION: Fruit₉(s,a,r,I) := L(s,r) ∧ J(s) ∧ P(s,r) ∧ N(s,I) ∧ K(a,r) ∧ Gd(a,s) ∧ Fh(s,I) ∧ Ge(a) ∧ Sc(s,a)
identity_declarations.ATOM_FIRE_GRAPH: FireAtoms(𝓢) := thresholded similarity graph over atoms
identity_declarations.CYCLE_DETECTION: Cycles(𝓢) := simple closed paths in FireAtoms(𝓢)
identity_declarations.WRITE_SIGNAL_ONLY: Write(result) := Record(result) iff result holds; skip if no connection found
identity_declarations.PRODUCTIVE_TRANSITION_THEOREM: T fixed as invariant ⇒ transition acts on 𝓢, producing 𝓢ₙ₊₁, not re-verifying T
identity_declarations.PROBE_DOMAIN_SIGNATURE: X := unknown or partially exposed structure
identity_declarations.FRONTIER_PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION: Frontier(K) := Preserve(X) ∧ Probe(X) ∧ Measure(R) ∧ Persist(R) ∧ Seal(R)
